CVE-2016-10141.title: An integer overflow vulnerability was observed in the regemit fun ...
CVE-2016-10141.description: An integer overflow vulnerability was observed in the regemit function in regexp.c in Artifex Software, Inc. MuJS before fa3d30fd18c348bb4b1f3858fb860f4fcd4b2045. The attack requires a regular expression with nested repetition. A successful exploitation of this issue can lead to code execution or a denial of service (buffer overflow) condition.

CVE-2016-9108.title: Integer overflow in the js_regcomp function in regexp.c in Artife ...
CVE-2016-9108.description: Integer overflow in the js_regcomp function in regexp.c in Artifex Software, Inc. MuJS before commit b6de34ac6d8bb7dd5461c57940acfbd3ee7fd93e allows attackers to cause a denial of service (application crash) via a crafted regular expression.

CVE-2016-9136.title: Artifex Software, Inc. MuJS before a0ceaf5050faf419401fe1b83acfa9 ...
CVE-2016-9136.description: Artifex Software, Inc. MuJS before a0ceaf5050faf419401fe1b83acfa950ec8a8a89 allows context-dependent attackers to obtain sensitive information by using the "crafted JavaScript" approach, related to a "Buffer Over-read" issue.

CVE-2016-9294.title: Artifex Software, Inc. MuJS before 5008105780c0b0182ea6eda83ad559 ...
CVE-2016-9294.description: Artifex Software, Inc. MuJS before 5008105780c0b0182ea6eda83ad5598f225be3ee allows context-dependent attackers to conduct "denial of service (application crash)" attacks by using the "malformed labeled break/continue in JavaScript" approach, related to a "NULL pointer dereference" issue affecting the jscompile.c component.

CVE-2017-5627.title: An issue was discovered in Artifex Software, Inc. MuJS before 400 ...
CVE-2017-5627.description: An issue was discovered in Artifex Software, Inc. MuJS before 4006739a28367c708dea19aeb19b8a1a9326ce08. The jsR_setproperty function in jsrun.c lacks a check for a negative array length. This leads to an integer overflow in the js_pushstring function in jsrun.c when parsing a specially crafted JS file.

CVE-2017-5628.title: An issue was discovered in Artifex Software, Inc. MuJS before 8f6 ...
CVE-2017-5628.description: An issue was discovered in Artifex Software, Inc. MuJS before 8f62ea10a0af68e56d5c00720523ebcba13c2e6a. The MakeDay function in jsdate.c does not validate the month, leading to an integer overflow when parsing a specially crafted JS file.
